nodes.name: 撒哈拉以南非洲
nodes.summary: 撒哈拉以南非洲是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联90种鸟类，包括草黃樹鴨、埃及雁、Western crested guinea fowl等90种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 紅嘴奎利亞雀
nodes.summary: 紅嘴奎利亞雀（Red-billed quelea，学名 Quelea quelea），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联3个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括稀树草原。

nodes.name: Random House Webster's Unabridged Dictionary

nodes.name: 稀树草原
nodes.summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 恩加米湖
nodes.summary: Lake Ngami is an endorheic lake in Botswana, north of the Kalahari Desert.

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is found in wet habitats, congregating at the shores of waterbodies, such as Lake Ngami, during flooding

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: The red-billed quelea is mostly found in tropical and subtropical areas with a seasonal semi-arid climate, resulting in dry thornbush grassland, including the Sahel, and its distribution covers most of sub-Saharan Africa
